title: SSL Certificate Management
content: All TLS certificates managed via AWS ACM (auto-renewal). External domains: *.shopflow.dev wildcard cert on CloudFront and ALB. Internal: cert-manager in K8s with Lets Encrypt for internal endpoints. Certificate expiry monitoring: Prometheus blackbox exporter checks every hour, alert if <30 days remaining. HSTS enabled with 1-year max-age on all responses.
